description: Catalog of all kernel contract seams — the typed boundaries between kernel truth and runtime consumers.

seams.description: Defines the canonical assembly structure — layers, materials, and composition rules.
Defines canonical drawing structures, sheet types, and layout rules.
Defines revision identity, version lineage, and change tracking rules.
Defines the evidence record structure — field types, source classifications, and candidate extraction rules.
Defines the graph backbone reference model — node types, edge types, traversal rules, and projection constraints.
Defines the issue type taxonomy — severity levels, classification rules, and lifecycle states.
Defines the blocker type taxonomy — blocking conditions, escalation rules, and resolution requirements.
Defines remediation action references — standard remediation types, applicability rules, and resolution patterns.
Defines QA constraint rules — validation criteria, pass/fail thresholds, and constraint composition.
Defines drawing package structure — bundling rules, sheet ordering, and package completeness criteria.
Defines export format contracts — output formats, delivery targets, and export validation rules.
Defines the condition pattern library — pattern structures, trigger definitions, evaluation rules, and boundary constraints.
